creator: net@arrishq.net
text:
Created attachment 254029
Patch file

Hi,
attached is a diff for sysutils/py-fluent_logger - a Python library to provide logging to sysutils/rubygem-fluentd using Python.
sysutils/py-salt as example already includes a module which may use this Python package (that's why the port).
Has been tested manually with make && make install && make deinstall and building with Synth, then having it installed on a running Salt Master to test if it works as expected.

One note - the Python package itself has the ability for running a build test, if desired. The port doesn't do this.
